creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
portmgr@ plans to make python 3.6 default version of python in the next days.

cad/freecad fails to build with DEFAULT_VERSIONS=python=3.x

Failure log:

http://package18.nyi.freebsd.org/data/112amd64-default-PR234633/2019-02-18_09h32m09s/logs/errors/FreeCAD-0.17.13541_6.log
